message:
feat(sync): complete RU (Repo Updater) sync implementation

Finish the RU integration by implementing the actual sync_ru() method
and wiring RuConfig through the CLI commands.

## SyncEngine RU Support (src/sync/engine.rs)

Implement sync_ru() method:
- Validates ru_config.enabled is true
- Creates RuClient with optional custom path
- Builds RuSyncOptions from SyncOptions (dry_run, parallel)
- Executes sync and captures results
- Maps RU outcomes to SyncReport:
  - Updated repos → report.pulled
  - Cloned repos → report.cloned (new field)
  - Conflicted repos → report.conflicts

Add RuConfig field to SyncEngine:
- Constructor now accepts RuConfig parameter
- Stored for use in sync_ru()

Update SyncReport:
- Add `cloned: Vec<String>` for newly cloned repos
- Update summary_line format: "↓{pulled} +{cloned} ↑{pushed}"

## CLI Command Wiring

All sync-related commands now pass ctx.config.ru.clone():

- src/cli/commands/sync.rs: Pass to SyncEngine::new()
- src/cli/commands/conflicts.rs: Pass to SyncEngine::new()
- src/cli/commands/remote.rs: Update help text (filesystem|git|ru)

## Error Handling

- Push-only mode returns error (ru is pull-only)
- Disabled ru config returns clear error message
- RU exit codes mapped appropriately

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -34,7 +34,7 @@ pub struct RemoteAddArgs {
     pub name: String,
     pub url: String,
 
-    /// Remote type (filesystem|git)
+    /// Remote type (filesystem|git|ru)
     #[arg(long, default_value = "filesystem")]
     pub remote_type: String,
